chat.title: Chat
chat.description: A persistent conversation session containing messages and analysis history.

id.description: The unique ID of the chat conversation.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this chat.

title.description: The custom title or symbol analyzed in this chat session.

symbol.description: The market symbol related to the chat.

messages.description: The sequence of messages between the user and assistant.

funding.title: FundingState
funding.description: User specific balance and funding transaction history.

balance.description: The cash balance of the user.

transactions.description: List of deposit and withdrawal transactions.

breaches.title: BreachesLog
breaches.description: User specific historical risk compliance breaches list.

events.description: List of recorded risk compliance breach events.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.description: User specific watchlist containing a list of stock and crypto symbols.

symbols.description: List of tickers or symbol strings in the user's watchlist.

/funding/{userId}.description: User specific balances and funding transactions.
